ai_engineer.title: AI Engineer
ai_engineer.description: We are looking for an AI Engineer to design, build, and deploy AI-powered systems including LLM applications, multi-agent systems, and RAG pipelines. You will work closely with product and infrastructure teams to bring intelligent features to production.

data_scientist.title: Data Scientist
data_scientist.description: We are looking for a Data Scientist to build predictive models, design experiments, and extract insights from data. You will apply ML and statistical methods to solve business problems.

backend_engineer.title: Backend Engineer
backend_engineer.description: We are looking for a Backend Engineer to design and implement scalable server-side systems. You will build REST APIs, manage databases, and ensure high availability of backend services.
